Deep blue suit, black shirt, silver tie, black trousers, black oxford shoes."},{"name":"Hạ An","appearance":"Initial appearance","description":"About twenty-five years old, Female, 二十五岁女性，鹅蛋脸，下颌尖细线条柔美。柳叶眉细长微弯，眉头淡眉尾聚。杏眼大而圆，双眼皮清晰，眼头略勾，眼尾自然下垂，目光清澈忧郁。鼻梁高挺，鼻头小巧。唇形丰满，下唇微厚。黑色直发过肩，发尾整齐，空气刘海轻薄覆额。身材纤细修长。白色立领衬衫，领口系黑色细带，黑色高腰阔腿西裤，脚穿黑色尖头低跟单鞋。"}],"location":{"name":"沈家别墅客厅_夜晚","description":"「沈家别墅客厅_夜晚」广角展示客厅全貌。中央放置深色欧式沙发，配刺绣抱枕，前有矮茶几上有烛台。左侧壁炉上方挂油画，右侧大型落地窗挂丝绸窗帘，窗边摆放落地灯。天花水晶吊灯散发暖光。沙发前铺织花地毯，形成开放活动区域。","availableSlots":["沙发和茶几之间的地毯区域","壁炉前的地面位置","右侧落地窗旁的空地","客厅入门处的玄关区域"]}}]}
entries.parsedImagePrompt: Eye-level Full Shot, static frame. Two distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, a tall athletic man in a deep blue suit, black shirt, and silver tie, his dark hair combed back, sharp-jawed with a defined face, holding a cup close to his chest with both hands, shoulders squared yet peaceful, a soft smile lighting his features as he looks to the right. While on the right of the frame, a slender young woman in a white stand-collar shirt with a black thin ribbon at the collar and black high-waisted wide-leg trousers, her shoulder-length straight black hair with airy bangs, oval face with a delicate pointed chin, her hands clasped behind her back, body slightly tilted in a gentle sway, cheeks rosy, her bright almond eyes holding his gaze with a shy smile. Wide shot of the quiet living room at night, a dark European-style sofa with embroidered cushions sits centrally, a low coffee table with a candlestick before it, a fireplace with an oil painting on the left, large floor-to-ceiling windows draped with silk curtains and a floor lamp on the right, a crystal chandelier glowing warmly from the ceiling over a floral patterned rug. Ambient mixed lighting, cool moonlight from the left windows blending with warm lamp light from the right, soft blend of cool and warm tones, deep depth of field (T8.0) rendering the entire living room clearly, warm-cool balanced peaceful color tone. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, transparent and deep imagery, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, anime-to-CG transformation, high-detail skin surface, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style. Cinematic portrait quality, ultra high detail face rendering, deep expressive eyes, smooth radiant skin texture.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The quiet living room at night, bathed in soft lamplight. A dark European-style sofa with embroidered cushions, a low coffee table with a candlestick before it. A fireplace with an oil painting on the left, large floor-to-ceiling windows with silk curtains and a floor lamp on the right. A crystal chandelier glowing warmly from the ceiling, a floral patterned rug covering the floor. The environment remains entirely static throughout.
[Characters] Full body visible. A tall athletic man in a deep blue suit, black shirt, silver tie, black trousers, black oxford shoes, dark hair combed back, sharp jaw, sharp eagle-like eyes, high nose, thin lips. Emotional state: soft and fond. A slender young woman in a white stand-collar shirt with a black thin ribbon, black high-waisted wide-leg trousers, black pointed low-heeled shoes, shoulder-length straight black hair with airy bangs, oval face, big round almond eyes, full lips. Emotional state: shy and joyful.

Shot 1 (Full Shot, 3.86s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: Slow-motion. The woman softly settles into her stance, her shoulders gently rising with a quiet breath, completing the subtle sway from an earlier moment. Across from her, the man's smile deepens with unwavering fondness as his gaze rests warmly upon her, a subtle tenderness in the stillness between them. Smooth and fluid throughout.
